text: as part of your plan, setup an epic gh issue (or do we already have one? maybe send a sonnet agent to give you an idea of what's on gh issues rn in the background) to track all the work that needs to happen -- I'd like chirp to proove this diagnostic with a tui or repl or some type of cli so that agents can iterate/debug [...] - **Phase C — agent-first prover (your CLI/REPL/TUI ask)**: the MCP server (`why_subscription_open`, `why_view_stale`, `what_closed_this_relay`, `list_scope_inventory`, `replay_session`) plus a headless CLI that drives a real Chirp session against real relays and also loads/scrubs exported capsules. Exit criterion baked into the epic: *an agent can answer "why is my feed empty?" from receipts alone.* This lands **before** the pane, so agents can iterate on the diagnostic itself.
